rows.value:
I started writing code professionally in 2008 and have since worked across the *full stack*, building *web and iOS* applications, internal tools and *cloud* services. Earlier in my career I took a *lead developer* role, managing a tech team and delivering enterprise projects.
These days *I use AI* extensively in my work and write mostly JavaScript/TypeScript. Over the years I have worked with many languages and platforms — from enterprise B2B applications to AI services, multi-region data residency features, infrastructure-as-code with AWS CDK, security compliance and CI/CD across 15+ repositories.
*I pick up new technologies quickly and enjoy owning projects end to end.*

rows.title: Languages
rows.value: Fluent in English, Italian and Turkish

rows.title: Past
rows.value: C# • Objective-C • jQuery • Sass • CoffeeScript • iOS • ASP.NET MVC • Heroku • PostgreSQL • SQLite • DynamoDB

*[Balsamiq](https://balsamiq.com)* _(Remote)_
Balsamiq is the leading low-fidelity wireframing software company. My passion to own projects end to end and ability to pick up new technologies allowed me to join Balsamiq where initially I took responsability of various existing custom internal tools and security initiatives.
Over the years, thanks to Balsamiq's flat structure, I wore *senior full-stack developer*, *senior cloud infrastructure engineer* and *security & compliance contributor* hats. Some of my most notable contributions include:
- Build *AI services* via third-party LLM providers
- Architect and develop custom internal tools (e.g., payment & subscription management via *Stripe*, e-commerce, project management)
- Manage *Elasticsearch* clusters for log management of production apps
- Lead cloud infrastructure modernization with *AWS CDK*
- Issue audits for GDPR
- Manage security compliance and bug bounty programs (SOC2/Vanta, Bugcrowd, HackerOne)
- Implement multi-region data residency for customer data
- Integrations for observability and analytics (PostHog, Klaviyo)
- Maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions across 15+ repositories

WEDO _(Cesena, Italy)_
At WEDO I had significant opportunities to grow into a *lead developer (full-stack + iOS)* of a mobile and web applications team, consult devs from other teams, interact with senior management and work closely with clients such as *[Bocconi](https://www.unibocconi.it)* and *[CINECA](https://www.cineca.it)*.

*[UniCredit](https://www.unicredit.it)* _(Milan, Italy)_
During my internship at UniCredit Global Information Services (UGIS), IT services provider for one of Europe’s largest banks, I visited, analyzed and studied the infrastructure of their data center and prepared a final report of my learnings.
Board member and sysadmin of university students association

rows.title: 2005–Today
rows.value: Founder and admin of [GNU](https://www.gnu.org) Turkish translation team
